code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut have = false
  mut num = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if have
        let sq = num * num
        if first
          out = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sq}"
        end
        have = false
        num = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      have = true
    else
      num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    let sq = num * num
    if first
      out = "#{sq}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sq}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
when None
  ()
end
